columns.fragility_note: EU27 aggregate masks large cross-country variance. Post-2009 crisis dip is structural.
columns.manipulability_note: Composition of EU27 changed; new member states added in 2004 and 2007.

columns.fragility_note: Rapid growth post-2000 makes normalization sensitive to endpoint. Near-zero pre-1995.
columns.manipulability_note: Collector vs. panel classification inconsistencies across national reports.

columns.fragility_note: Data quality low pre-2005. Many zero entries that may be missing rather than absent.
Climate finance flows are lumpy and policy-driven. Not a continuous demand signal.
columns.manipulability_note: Definition of climate finance expenditure varies across budget cycles.

columns.fragility_note: Near-zero until ~2010; exponential growth post-2015 dominates the series.
columns.manipulability_note: KTOE conversion from EV fleet estimates; methodology changes across IEA editions.

notes: EU27 energie pilot. O=industrial production, R=solar collector installed base (renewable adaptability), I=heat pump capacity (thermal integration), demand=climate finance (SDG 13.5), S=road transport electrification (symbolic green transition diffusion). Time range: 1990 onwards; sparse coverage before 2000 for several proxies.
